tasks.title: Implement optional robots.txt compliance
evidence: AGENTS.md explicitly states 'Robots.txt: Ignored by design'
No robots.txt parsing or checking in codebase
Some users need polite crawling for compliance
plan: Implement user-agent matching and rule evaluation
Add CrawlDelay support for rate limiting
Cache robots.txt per host to avoid repeated fetches
Log when URLs are skipped due to robots.txt
